## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and align on the scope and execution of the AI Pricing Index project for Metronome.](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Project aims to position Metronome as a leader in AI pricing information, driving organic traffic and potentially impacting the sales funnel](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Initial focus on 20 companies with diverse pricing models, expanding to 100+ over time](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Quarterly updates planned, with potential for more frequent updates if needed](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Metronome to provide seed content for their "take" on various pricing models to ensure authenticity](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)

## Topics

### AI Pricing Index Overview

  - [Comprehensive index of AI company pricing models](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [Positions Metronome as an authoritative resource in AI pricing](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Aims to rival major AI companies' pages in search results within 6-12 months](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Potential for expansion into additional content verticals (comparisons, in-depth articles)](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)

### Page Structure and Content

  - [Main dashboard/pricing index page with individual company subpages](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [Sections include: above-the-fold summary, pricing cards, pricing snapshot, deep-dive analysis, timeline, and Metronome's take](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Editorial input needed for Metronome's perspective on various pricing models](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Chang to compile existing Metronome content on pricing models for the team to process](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)

### Data and Update Frequency

  - [Primary data sources: company websites, blog posts, and other public information](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Initial update frequency set to quarterly, with flexibility to increase if needed](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Focus on significant structural changes rather than minor price point adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### Project Execution

  - [Start with 20 companies across different pricing model types as a refinement batch](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [Expand to 50+ companies, enabling trend analysis and comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Low priority for historical pricing data and dedicated comparison tools initially](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
  - [SEO strategy includes keyword optimization and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)

### Next Steps and Resources

  - [Chang to share list of top 100 AI companies for initial categorization](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [Team to create rough categorization of pricing models using GPT](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [Discuss design and development resources with Chris (Metronome team)](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=1611.0)
  - [Matthew to draft internal PRD for engineering requirements](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Chang to compile and share Metronome's existing content on pricing model perspectives](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [Chang to share list of top 100 AI companies for initial categorization](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [Team to create rough categorization of pricing models using GPT](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [Matthew to draft internal PRD for engineering requirements](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
  - [Megan to facilitate conversation about project pricing once Matthew has more information](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)
  - [Chang and Megan to discuss resource allocation with Chris for design and development](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [Matthew to investigate design capabilities to offer as an alternative to in-house work](https://fathom.video/share/ynYq-UC5tPnZmdBX2AJtsQzuYGCnmz2c?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
